excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in Operations Management lists Early round opening on 2026-07-02 and closing on 2026-10-20. Source: https://www.polyu.edu.hk/study/pg/tpg/2027/44092-ofm-opm Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round) Non-Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round)
matchedTextBefore: Students can complete the programme in one (1) year in full-time mode depending on their study pace.
